examples: As vice president Joe Biden learned on his recent visit to a Beijing restaurant, nary a part of the hog is wasted.
In reality, that "handsome prince" we seem to be promising is in good company with Santa Claus and the Easter Bunny—nary a one of them seems to exist.
If you analyze a Pixar film, you'll find nary a flaw.
It was brainstorming with nary a concrete step, but plenty of ideas to chew over.
No matter how quickly I twisted, tumbled, and turned, there was nary a stumble.
